audience: The ideal target audience for this video is anyone who grew up in the 80s and 90s and is nostalgic for the music of that era, as well as younger viewers who are familiar with the song through its widespread use as a meme and are looking to experience the original version. This audience likely includes fans of classic pop music, retro enthusiasts, and anyone looking for a fun and entertaining music video to watch.

timestamps.description: Intro to the music video with the iconic opening lyrics
Rick Astley starts singing and the music picks up
The chorus kicks in and the video cuts to a montage of Rick Astley performing
The bridge of the song features a soulful vocal performance by Rick Astley
The song ends with a final chorus and the video fades to black

flaws.why_it_hurts: This lowers watch-time and click-through rates, as viewers are less likely to be drawn in by a boring or uninteresting thumbnail
flaws.fix: Create eye-catching and attention-grabbing thumbnails that showcase the iconic song and Rick Astley's charismatic performance

flaws.why_it_hurts: This hurts video discoverability and search engine optimization, making it harder for new viewers to find the video
flaws.fix: Optimize video descriptions and tags with relevant keywords, such as the song title, artist name, and genre, to improve video visibility and search rankings

flaws.issue: No clear call-to-action or engagement strategy
flaws.why_it_hurts: This reduces audience engagement and interaction, as viewers are not encouraged to like, comment, or subscribe
flaws.fix: Add a clear call-to-action at the end of the video, such as asking viewers to like and subscribe, and engage with the audience through comments and social media to build a loyal fan base
